title: MCA Data Centre Fire: Deadlines Extended & Forms Reopened (June 20, 2026) - Important Update!
content:
# MCA Data Centre Fire: Deadlines Extended & Forms Reopened (June 20, 2026) - Important Update!

Ek important update hai stakeholders ke liye! Ministry of Corporate Affairs (MCA) ne recent Data Centre fire ke baad filing deadlines extend kar di hain aur kuch cancelled forms ko reopen karne ka option bhi diya hai.

The extensions are a crucial relief measure, aimed at mitigating disruptions caused by a fire incident at the MCA21 Data Centre on June 5, 2026, and the ongoing capacity enhancement and restoration activities.

Here's a quick summary of the key relaxations:

*   **DPT-3 Filing Extension (Financial Year 2025-26):**
    *   **Old Due Date:** June 30, 2026
    *   **New Due Date:** July 31, 2026 (without any additional fees)
    *   **Official Document:** This extension is provided through General Circular No. 02/2026, dated June 19, 2026.

*   **Name Reservation Validity Extension:**
    *   **For names expiring between June 21 and June 30, 2026 (inclusive):** The validity of such name reservations has been automatically extended until July 10, 2026.
    *   **For names that expired between June 5 and June 20, 2026 (inclusive):** Stakeholders can request an extension up to July 10, 2026. This requires raising a ticket with the MCA Helpdesk on or before June 30, 2026, and is subject to verification of the approved name's continued availability.

*   **E-form Resubmission Deadlines and Reopening of Cancelled Forms:**
    *   **For e-forms with resubmission deadlines falling between June 21 and June 30, 2026 (inclusive):** The validity of these deadlines is automatically extended up to July 10, 2026.
    *   **For e-forms whose resubmission deadlines fell between June 5 and June 20, 2026 (inclusive):** Stakeholders may seek extensions for resubmission up to July 10, 2026, by contacting the MCA Helpdesk on or before June 30, 2026.
    *   **Reopening of Cancelled Forms:** In cases where e-forms were cancelled due to non-resubmission during the period of June 5 to June 20, 2026, they may be reopened upon receipt of a request through the MCA Helpdesk. After due verification, the concerned e-form will be made available for resubmission until July 10, 2026.
    *   **Official Document for Name Reservations & E-form Resubmissions:** These measures are outlined in Office Memorandum No. EGov-04/2/2021-e-Gov-MCA (Comp.No. 185122) dated June 20, 2026.

These steps have been taken by the Ministry to ensure that businesses do not face undue hardship due to the technical disruptions.

## Read the Official Document
* [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.mca.gov.in/content/mca/corporate/mcacorp/en/latest-update.html)

*Published on: 21 June 2026*
